name: Cresval Capital Corp.
summary: Cresval Capital Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of base and precious metals in Canada. The company explores for copper, gold, molybdenum, and silver deposits. It owns interests in the Thunder Copper property that includes 13 contiguous mineral claims covering an area of approximately 11,127 hectares located to the west-northwest of Goldbridge, British Columbia; and the New Raven property, which consists of 6 mineral claims covering an area of 3,508 hectares located to the southwest of Lillooet, British Columbia. Cresval Capital Corp. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
